**IDENTIFYING COMMUNITY NEEDS**  
- IDENTIFYING COMMUNITY NEEDS-KEY STEPS TO UNDERSTAND THE NEEDS OF THE COMMUNITY  
- IDENTIFYING COMMUNITY NEEDS-ENGAGE WITH LOCAL LEADERS AND MEMBERS TO GAIN INSIGHT INTO THEIR NEEDS  

### BUILDING TRUST AND RELATIONSHIPS  
- BUILDING TRUST AND RELATIONSHIPS-START WITH OPEN COMMUNICATION AND ACTIVITIES THAT FOSTER CONNECTIONS  
- BUILDING TRUST AND RELATIONSHIPS-EMPHASIZE HONESTY AND RELIABILITY TO BUILD LONG-TERM RELATIONSHIPS  

### FOSTERING INCLUSION AND PARTNERSHIP  
- FOSTERING INCLUSION AND PARTNERSHIP-ENCOURAGE PARTICIPATION FROM ALL SEGMENTS OF THE COMMUNITY  
- FOSTERING INCLUSION AND PARTNERSHIP-CREATE OPPORTUNITIES FOR COLLABORATION AND SHARED RESPONSIBILITY
